summary: Aplikasi kasir bengkel (workshop POS app) with inventory management, profit/loss reporting, and service/goods distinction.
architectural_notes: Inventory items have two types: 'Barang' (goods, with qty tracking) and 'Jasa' (service, no qty limit — qty field hidden)
Profit/loss report relies on harga jual and harga beli stored per inventory item

existing_features.title: Rename all occurrences of 'Catalog' / 'Katalog' to 'Inventory' across the entire application — including the sidebar navigation label, page title, route path, and any internal references.

Add a 'selling price' (harga jual) and 'purchase price' (harga beli) field to the product/item data model in the backend. Both fields are required numeric values (in Rupiah). Update all add/edit dialogs in the Inventory page to include these two fields. Display both prices in the item list table.

Add an item type selector ('Goods' / 'Service') to the product/item data model and to the Inventory add/edit dialogs. When 'Service' is selected, the qty (stock) field is hidden and treated as unlimited (no stock tracking). When 'Goods' is selected, the qty field remains visible and required.
Update the Profit/Loss (Laba Rugi) section in the Reports page to calculate profit using the selling price minus purchase price per item sold, aggregated across transactions in the selected period.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add selling price (harga jual) and purchase price (harga beli) fields in Inventory for profit/loss reporting
Add item type selector (Barang/Jasa) in Inventory; for Jasa (service), qty field is hidden/empty as quantity is unlimited
